name: Alex Rivera
bio: Met during freshman year engineering classes. We used to pull all-nighters coding projects and still debate the best sci-fi movies.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Colleague from my first job in marketing. We bonded over early morning yoga sessions and now share career advice and weekend hiking plans.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Known each other since middle school basketball team. Still compete in pickup games and talk about starting a fantasy football league again.

name: Sophie Laurent
bio: Met while studying in Paris. We explored hidden cafés together and still swap recipes and travel stories from our European adventures.

name: Jamal Khan
bio: Former neighbor who introduced me to live jazz nights. We play guitar together occasionally and discuss everything from politics to new albums.

name: Emma Patel
bio: Joined the same book club three years ago. We love discussing thrillers and have started a tradition of monthly coffee and deep conversations.

name: Liam Chen
bio: Met through an online multiplayer game years ago and became real-life friends. We still squad up for sessions and share tech tips.

name: Fatima Al-Sayed
bio: Connected through community volunteering events. We often talk about family, travel dreams, and ways to support local causes together.
